shared_properties: The panel uses a centered presentation format tuned for short-term memory reading during the reveal phase.
Core palette fields remain fixed at primary #111111, background #000000, and accent #FFFFFF.
Large card wells and strong border contrast support rapid reading before the panel disappears.
differences: The reveal board dedicates more space to the queue itself and less to controls than the planning panel.
A heavy outer frame and bright inner wells make the sequence readable under growing weather pressure.
The lower edge reserves room for a countdown timer and confirm prompt without cluttering the queue rows.

reference_images.label: jarl_of_blizzard_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the winter survival loop, queue-memory mechanic, building roster, and 1920x1080 Bevy target.

reference_images.label: jarl_of_blizzard_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the monochrome blizzard mood, Viking settlement silhouettes, and snow density targets.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Centered memory-phase UI panel rendered above the world and below the top HUD during queue reveal moments.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/art_000017.png during UI boot and show it only during the memory countdown window.
runtime_notes: Keep the panel in the center safe area so edge whiteout does not swallow the primary queue information.
Expose timer anchor points for a runtime countdown bar and confirmation prompt.
Fade the panel out cleanly before execution begins so the world view remains unobstructed.

context.usage: Centered memory board used to show the full queue briefly before the player executes from recall.

shape.silhouette: Centered monochrome board with oversized queue wells, timer gutter, and a bold outer frame.

acceptance_criteria: PNG canvas is exactly 720x420px with enough queue wells to display seven ordered actions.
The queue wells remain readable inside the central safe area even when art_000007 overlays the edges.
Timer and prompt gutters stay visually separated from the main queue wells.
